name: Csl Limited
analysis: CSL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 58% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$112.0400, stop A$92.4759, target A$126.4900 (0.74:1) — then trail it.
